cause: stale /jobs/<role>/london URL returns the ENTIRE board unfiltered (h1 reads a bare 'NNN,NNN Jobs')
fix: use /jobs/<role>-jobs-in-<location>; feed.py now aborts on the bare-count h1 signature (X.1 guard)

symptom: re-sources report ~100% fresh, page-1 harvest looks done
cause: tracker rows are BARE /jobs/<id> but dedup regex assumed slug /jobs/<slug>/<id>
fix: canon_ids matches slug OR bare OR bare 6-8 digit id

symptom: NO APPLY BUTTON on a role that should be applyable
cause: external/premium route OR a degraded-backend blank render (false negative)
fix: re-test on a healthy backend via cfx.goto (verifies innerText>0); stamp the verdict with verdicts.py so a degraded-window negative is quarantined
